name: Kaspa
analysis: KAS has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 57% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry $0.0327, stop $0.0285, target $0.0372 (1.04:1) — then trail it.
